Total Breakthrough Training
Juaquin and Kim’s difference’s when faced with financial
dillema:
Juaquin needs to have a plan. He is always trying to prepare for
worst case scenario.
Kim gives Juaquin speeches about hope. She knows something
will work out. A family member will give them a loan. They
can move to a small apartment.

Total Breakthrough Training
Tony’s Perspective:
Juaquin is spending his time feeling sorry about himself
instead of taking action to find work.
Systemic Perspective:
Bring as many people into the solution as possible. SI Coach
should contact every person who cares about Juaquin to help
him.

Total Breakthrough Training
Optional ways to work with a client like Juaquin:
Ask yourself is depression medically based?
Has there been a real injustice to this person?
Who has the SI Coach reached out to in the client’s
community?
How is spouse/family helping client?

Total Breakthrough Training
“See it as it is, Not worse than it is.”
“Economy is worse than ever…”
“You had a stroke, but it isn’t worse than it is.”
“Where life puts us… There is winter for everyone.”
“We are so caught up in STORY it takes over our emotions.”
“Suffering doesn’t come from facts, it is the meaning you give.
it.”

-- 6 of 19 --

Total Breakthrough Training
How does learned helplessness work in a person’s life?
Suffering now because they are stuck and can’t see outside of story.
Strategy for getting out of story:
Describe the guy or gal telling the story of defeat. Take on posture of
someone you respect. Now Coach asks the “new identity” about the
real person. Would it matter if people rejected you? Does he/she have
it in them? I bet you know better than anybody what the real problem
is. How do you help him/her?
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

Total Breakthrough Training
Tony’s Question, “Where does this muscle come from?”
Juaquin answers, “Doing something hard.”
Tony explains pushing against something. He tells Juaquin
your not willing to give up this muscle but you’ll give up your
faith muscle. You’ll give up your work muscle. Why?
Juaquin still believes: “I am worthy. She married a tremendous
man. I can move on.”

Total Breakthrough Training
Important Question for Juaquin, “Who do you get pissed at?”
This activates Juaquin to think of his anger instead of his pity.
“I can relate to you more than you know. I won’t waste your time
telling you the details.”
In this simple statement Tony is giving Juaquin certainty that he is on
his side. He consistently lets Juaquin know how he isn’t alone. He
uses stories about others, himself, science, and statistics.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

Total Breakthrough Training
Shift perspective about rejection.
You can be a warning or an example.
You are an archetype.
You can change from being a warning or an example.
Tony aligns himself again by talking about his mission and all the mistakes he
made. Tells Juaquin, “You need to think bigger than basketball… You need to be
an example to these kids. Use this game to become a bigger man.”
“It’s not about the game. It’s about who you become.”

Show me, “This is my time.”
Tony reminds him to feel it. The certainty, the arrogance. Asks

“Confidence,” answers Juaquin.
Tony keeps asking him, “And what if that doesn’t work?”
He equates it to walking. A baby never stops trying until they
walk.
Tony tells him key is GIVING UP STORY.

Total Breakthrough Training
Tony makes the coaching a battle for the heart. The fighter has
to come out. Then he explains, “I’ve been there.” Tony talks
about tears and feeling. Tells Juaquin we shift feeling sorry for
himself into what you’ve got to do.
Asks Juaquin to see himself on chair. Juaquin explains who
that guy in the chair feeling sorry for himself is. What does he
get, pity. What is he really? He is scared. He is 36 and has to
face this stuff anyways.
Tony reminds him again he is like everybody who has the fear
that they aren’t enough.

Total Breakthrough Training
How many more years could you really have played?
Tony is giving him reality. This is a better story time came a little early to
transition his career.
He uses Farmer story about wild horse and plow. Others say this is a miracle.
Farmer says, Maybe. Then horse disappears. Neighbors say, Why is God
punishing you. Farmer is a wise man. Farmer says, Maybe. Next day horse comes
back with two more horses. Now the story goes personal Tony brings it to Juaquin
by saying farmer is from same home town as Juaquin. Juaquin has a shift feels
light headed. Farmer is him. Tony tells him what is happening is not concious
things are leaving your body. What are you going to do now that you have 3
horses and you are so generous. Farmer says, Maybe. Guess what happens, the
boy gets bucked off horse and is smashed by trampling horses. Doctor says, boy is
lucky to survive. Everyone says, you are going to lose everything. Juaquin sits
down again. Tony asks, What happens? How do you explain boy getting so hurt
he is unable to function. What does farmer say Juaquin? Juaquin answers, the
farmer says, Maybe. Now war brakes out. Every young man is taken except
farmer’s son. Everyone says, God has blessed you. Farmer says, Maybe.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 18 of 19 --

Total Breakthrough Training
Tony asks, “What do you get out of the story?”
Juaquin answers expectations, opportunities happen, you need to be
prepared and keep even keel.
Tony explains, “From this tragedy you have to decide, I am enough
even if I don’t play basketball.”
Have to start thinking big. Your body had a reason to do what it did.
Something we can’t understand.
Question is now, “What can I do for my children, for my wife?”
Juaquin answers he needs, wants to be families center. Tony and Kim
correct him that he will be their center.
